rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.
Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini missed 'Brought for.' and the associated amounts, incorrectly categorizing it as a header. Visual verification confirms amounts.

Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the amounts 7/3/9 to this row (which belong to the previous row) and misinterpreted 'Lodge' as 'Loop'. Visual verification confirms 2 shillings, 11 pence.

Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini again shifted amounts from a previous row's *correct* values (8s 5d, which it then incorrectly assigned to Row 5). Visual verification confirms 'Jus.' in description and amounts as 8 shillings, 5 pence.

rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini shifted amounts and misinterpreted parts of the description. Visual verification confirms 6 pence.

Amounts are consistent between extractors. Adopted gemini-flash's description 'Carele. Dr' as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Capell. &c'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.
Amounts are consistent. Adopted gemini-flash's description, as gpt-5-mini incorrectly appended text from the next row ('Manor Farm').
Adopted gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms shillings as '14', not '17'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.
Amounts are consistent. Adopted gpt-5-mini's description 'Bills &c.' as more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Bill do'.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.

rows.notes: Amounts consistent. Adopted gemini-flash's description which correctly segments the long entry. gpt-5-mini combined text from multiple ledger lines into one entry.

rows.description: Fanshawe. moving Library Books. See folio Order Dec 14-1854
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misread description details and incorrectly placed the '10' in the pounds column instead of shillings. Visual verification confirms 10 shillings.
Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed the '3' in the pounds column instead of shillings. Visual verification confirms 3 shillings.

rows.description: Fern Barn. Straw & Carriage for Thatching.
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misread 'Fern' as 'Terry' and incorrectly shifted the amount values from shillings/pence to pounds/shillings. Visual verification confirms 19 shillings, 5 pence.
Amounts consistent. Adopted gemini-flash's description ('Browsele') as a slightly more accurate transcription.

rows.description: Waldron Expenses. Copy hold. New Trustee
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini, with very minor stylistic difference in description (Trustee vs Trustees, parenthesis).
Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed the '12' in the pounds column instead of shillings. Visual verification confirms 12 shillings.

rows.description: Tweed. Journey to London on Coll. Acct
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and their interpretation. Adopted gemini-flash's excellent notes explaining the reinterpretation of visually ambiguous column placement to adhere to currency rules (15 pence being invalid), leading to 1 pound 15 shillings. Visual verification confirms 1 pound, 15 shillings.

rows.description: Honor. Work done on Jeckham Farm alias
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misread description ('Seckham' vs 'Jeckham', 'allc' vs 'alias') and incorrectly placed '15' in the pounds column instead of shillings. Visual verification confirms 15 shillings.
Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini, with very minor stylistic difference in description (Rep. vs Rep:, Witterham vs Wittersham). Visual confirms 'Witterham'.

Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini.
Adopted gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms description 'Sickhams' and amount 19 shillings (not 17).
